mnemonics: Crazy Dogs Never Insult Brothers Constantly
keyPoints: A set is separated if it can be written as a union of two disjoint non-empty closed sets.
A set is disconnected if it is not separated.
A set is connected if it cannot be written as a union of two disjoint non-empty open sets.
A component of a connected set is a maximal connected subset, i.e., it is connected and cannot be divided into two non-empty connected subsets.
A connected subset of R is a subset of R that is connected in the standard topology.
